member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableControllerTemplate`2
member.summary: Provides a base class for controllers that handle data table operations with support for both form and JSON requests.
member.remarks: This abstract class is designed to facilitate the creation of controllers that manage data table operations. It provides two endpoints for handling data table requests: one for form submissions and another for JSON payloads.
member.typeparam: The type of the view model used in the data table results.
The type of the request object used for JSON requests.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableControllerTemplate`2.#ctor(Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DoAction.IDoActionFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableControllerTemplate{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The factory used to create actions for data operations.
The logger instance used for logging operations within the controller.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableControllerTemplate`2.KeyPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the prefix used for keys in the services collection.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableControllerTemplate`2.DataTableAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormCollection)
member.summary: Processes a DataTable request asynchronously using form data.
member.remarks: This method expects the request to be in the form of "application/x-www-form-urlencoded".
member.param: The form data collection containing parameters for the DataTable request.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an of type representing the processed DataTable result.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableControllerTemplate`2.DataTableAsync(`1)
member.summary: Processes a data table request asynchronously and returns the result.
member.remarks: This method is designed to handle HTTP POST requests with a JSON payload. It consumes the request, processes it according to the specified type, and returns a data table result encapsulated in an . Ensure that the request object is correctly formatted and contains all necessary parameters for successful processing.
member.param: The request object containing parameters for the data table operation. This must be a valid JSON object that conforms to the expected structure for .
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an with a representing the processed data table.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandler`2
member.summary: Handles data table queries by processing requests and transforming entities into view models.
member.remarks: This class extends to provide specific functionality for handling data table requests. It utilizes a logger for logging operations, a repository factory for data access, a search handler factory for processing search queries, and a mapper for transforming entities into view models.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity being queried, which must implement .
The type of the view model to which entities are mapped.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandler`2.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandler{`0,`1}},Diamond.Core.Repository.IRepositoryFactory,Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandlerFactory{`0},AutoMapper.IMapper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance used for logging operations within the handler.
The factory used to create repository instances for data access.
The factory used to create search handlers for processing search queries.
The mapper used for transforming entities to view models.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3
member.summary: Provides a template for handling data table queries with support for filtering, searching, and paging.
member.remarks: This abstract class serves as a base for implementing data table query handlers. It provides a structured approach to executing queries with filtering, searching, and paging capabilities. Derived classes can override the provided virtual methods to customize the query execution process.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity being queried.
The type of the view model used to represent the entity in the result.
The type of the request containing query parameters.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance used for logging operations within the query handler.
The factory used to create repository instances for data access.
The factory used to create search handlers for processing search queries on .
The mapper used to map between and .

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger used for logging operations within the query handler.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.RepositoryFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the repository factory used to create repository instances for data access.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.SearchHandlerFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the search handler factory used to create search handlers for processing search queries on .

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.Mapper
member.summary: Gets or sets the mapper used to map between and .

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.ExecuteQueryAsync(`2,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Executes an asynchronous query based on the specified request and initial expression, returning a result set of view models.
member.remarks: This method retrieves a repository for the specified entity type and constructs a query using the provided initial expression, along with additional filter and search expressions. It executes the query and maps the resulting entities to view models. The result includes the total number of records, the number of filtered records, and the data set.
member.param: The request object containing query parameters and options. Cannot be null.
An initial filter expression to apply to the query. This expression is combined with additional filters and search criteria.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a with a that includes the queried data, draw count, and record counts.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.OnRequestStarted(`2)
member.summary: Invoked when a request is initiated, allowing for customization or logging.
member.remarks: This method can be overridden in a derived class to perform additional actions when a request starts, such as logging or modifying the request. The default implementation returns the request unchanged.
member.param: The request object that is being started. This parameter cannot be null.
member.returns: The original or modified request object to be processed.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.OnGetFilterExpression(`2)
member.summary: Constructs a filter expression based on the specified request.
member.remarks: This method uses the provided request to generate a filter expression that can be used to query entities. Override this method to customize the filter expression logic.
member.param: The request containing filter criteria to apply.
member.returns: An expression that represents the filter to be applied to entities of type .

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.OnGetSearchExpression(`2)
member.summary: Constructs a search expression based on the specified request.
member.remarks: This method uses the to apply the search logic defined in the request. Override this method to customize the search expression generation for specific request types.
member.param: The request containing search criteria and parameters.
member.returns: An expression that represents the search criteria to be applied to entities of type .

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.OnBuildExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Builds a combined expression by logically AND-ing the provided expressions.
member.param: The initial expression to start the combination process.
An expression used to filter the entities.
An expression used to search within the entities.
member.returns: An expression that represents the logical AND combination of the initial, filter, and search expressions.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.OnExecuteQuery(`2,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},Diamond.Core.Repository.IQueryableRepository{`0})
member.summary: Executes a query on the specified repository using the provided request and filter expression.
member.remarks: This method applies ordering and paging to the query based on the parameters specified in the . If the request contains ordered columns, the query will be ordered accordingly before applying the filter and paging.
member.param: The request object containing parameters for ordering and paging the query results.
An expression used to filter the entities in the repository.
The repository from which the entities are queried.
member.returns: An containing the entities that match the specified filter and query parameters.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableQueryHandlerTemplate`3.OnRequestCompleted(`2,Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DoAction.ControllerActionResult{Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult{`1}})
member.summary: Invoked when a request processing is completed, allowing for additional handling or modification of the result.
member.param: The original request that was processed.
The result of the request processing, which can be modified before being returned.
member.returns: The potentially modified result of the request processing.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for working with and .

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.ApplyOrdering``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest,Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandlerFactory{``0})
member.summary: Applies ordering to the specified query based on the order criteria provided in the request.
member.remarks: This method processes the ordering criteria specified in the and applies them to the . If a custom search handler is available for a column, it will be used to apply the ordering. Otherwise, a default ordering is applied. The method returns a new query with the specified ordering applied.
member.typeparam: The type of the entities in the query.
member.param: The query to which ordering will be applied.
The data table request containing the ordering criteria.
The factory used to obtain search handlers for custom ordering logic.
member.returns: An with the applied ordering.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.ApplyPaging``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest)
member.summary: Applies paging to the specified query based on the provided data table request.
member.remarks: The method uses the and properties to determine the starting point and the number of elements to return. If is less than or equal to zero, all elements from the starting point are returned.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the query.
member.param: The query to which paging will be applied.
The data table request containing paging parameters. If is null, the query is returned without paging.
member.returns: An that contains the elements of the query after applying the specified paging parameters. If is null, the original query is returned.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.ApplySearch``2(Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest,Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandlerFactory{``0})
member.summary: Constructs a search expression for filtering entities based on the search criteria specified in the request.
member.remarks: This method generates a dynamic search expression by iterating over the properties of the specified view model type. For each property, it uses a search handler to create a filter expression, which is combined into a single expression using logical OR operations. If no search criteria are provided, the method returns an expression that evaluates to .
member.typeparam: The type of the entity to be filtered.
The type of the view model containing properties to be searched.
member.param: The data table request containing search parameters. Must not be null.
The factory used to obtain search handlers for each property. Must not be null.
member.returns: An expression that evaluates to for entities matching the search criteria, or if no criteria are specified.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.ApplyFilter``2(Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest,Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandlerFactory{``0})
member.summary: Constructs a filter expression for the specified entity type based on the search criteria provided in the data table request.
member.remarks: This method constructs a filter expression by examining the search criteria specified in the . It uses the to obtain handlers that apply the search filters to the corresponding entity properties. The resulting expression can be used to filter a collection of entities based on the specified search criteria.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity to which the filter will be applied.
The type of the view model that contains properties corresponding to the entity's columns.
member.param: The data table request containing the search criteria for filtering.
The factory used to obtain search handlers for applying search filters to entity properties.
member.returns: An expression that represents the combined filter criteria for the entity type. Returns a default expression that evaluates to if no search criteria are provided.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.IndexOf``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Returns the zero-based index of the first element in the sequence that satisfies the specified predicate.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the sequence.
member.param: The sequence to search.
A function to test each element for a condition.
member.returns: The zero-based index of the first element that satisfies the predicate; otherwise, the number of elements in the sequence if no such element is found.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.AddOrderBySort``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending or descending order based on a specified column name.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of .
member.param: The sequence of elements to sort.
The name of the column to sort by. This must be a valid property name of .
The direction of the sort. Use "asc" for ascending order or any other value for descending order.
member.returns: An whose elements are sorted according to the specified column and direction.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.AddThenBySort``1(System.Linq.IOrderedQueryable{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a secondary sorting criterion to the existing ordered query based on the specified column name and direction.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the source query.
member.param: The existing ordered query to which the secondary sort will be applied.
The name of the column to sort by. This must be a valid property name of .
The direction of the sort. Use "asc" for ascending order or "desc" for descending order.
member.returns: An that represents the query with the additional sorting applied.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.GetExpression``1(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a lambda expression that accesses a specified property of a given entity type.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity containing the property.
member.param: The name of the property to access. This parameter is case-insensitive.
member.returns: An representing a lambda expression that accesses the specified property of the entity type and returns its value as an .

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.OrderBy``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order according to a specified property name.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the source sequence.
member.param: The sequence of elements to order.
The name of the property to sort the elements by. This property must exist on .
member.returns: An whose elements are sorted according to the specified property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.OrderByDescending``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Sorts the elements of a sequence in descending order according to a specified property name.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of .
member.param: The sequence of elements to order.
The name of the property to sort by. This property must exist on .
member.returns: An whose elements are sorted in descending order according to the specified property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.ThenBy``1(System.Linq.IOrderedQueryable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Performs a subsequent ordering of the elements in a sequence in ascending order according to a specified property name.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the source sequence.
member.param: An that contains elements to be sorted.
The name of the property to sort by. This must be a valid property name of .
member.returns: An whose elements are sorted according to the specified property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.ThenByDescending``1(System.Linq.IOrderedQueryable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Performs a subsequent ordering of the elements in a sequence in descending order, according to a specified property name.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of .
member.param: An that contains elements to sort.
The name of the property to sort by. This must be a valid property name of .
member.returns: An whose elements are sorted in descending order according to the specified property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableExtensions.OrderedColumns``1(Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest)
member.summary: Retrieves an ordered collection of columns based on the specified order criteria in the request.
member.remarks: This method processes the columns specified in the and applies the ordering criteria defined in the request's order property. Each in the result contains the column name and the direction of sorting.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity associated with the data table request.
member.param: The data table request containing column and order information. Cannot be null.
member.returns: An representing the columns ordered according to the request. Returns an empty collection if no ordering is specified or if the request is null.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory`1
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating search handlers for a specified entity type.
member.remarks: This factory utilizes dependency injection to retrieve available search handlers and selects the appropriate handler based on the specified property name.
member.typeparam: The type of entity for which the search handlers are created.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory{`0}},System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance used for logging operations within the factory.
The service provider used to resolve dependencies for search handlers.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory`1.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger used for logging messages related to the operations.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory`1.ServiceProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the service provider used to resolve service dependencies.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory`1.GetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a search handler for the specified property of the entity.
member.param: The name of the property for which to retrieve the search handler. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an for the specified property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerFactory`1.OnGetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a search handler for the specified property name.
member.param: The name of the property for which to retrieve the search handler. This parameter is case-insensitive.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the associated with the specified property name, or if no handler is found.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableQueryHandler`3
member.summary: Defines a handler for executing data table queries and returning results in a specified view model format.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity being queried.
The type of the view model to which the query results are mapped.
The type of the request object containing query parameters.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableQueryHandler`3.ExecuteQueryAsync(`2,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Executes an asynchronous query based on the specified request and pre-filter expression.
member.param: The request object containing query parameters and options.
An expression used to pre-filter the entities before executing the query. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an with a representing the query results.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest
member.summary: Defines the contract for a DataTable request, including pagination, sorting, and search criteria.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.Columns
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of columns associated with the request.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.Draw
member.summary: Gets or sets the draw count for the current operation.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the items to return.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.Order
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of order instructions for sorting.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.Search
member.summary: Gets or sets the search configuration for the request.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.SearchBuilder
member.summary: Gets or sets the search builder configuration for the form.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTableRequest.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting index for the operation.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTablesObject
member.summary: Represents an object that can hold additional data in a key-value pair format.
member.remarks: This interface is designed to be implemented by classes that require the ability to store extra data dynamically. The data is stored as a dictionary where the key is a string and the value is a , allowing for flexible data types.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.IDataTablesObject.ExtraData
member.summary: Gets or sets additional data associated with the object.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchType
member.summary: Specifies the type of search to be performed.
member.remarks: This enumeration is used to indicate whether a search operation should be conducted globally across all available data or restricted to a specific column.

member.name: F:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchType.GlobalSearch
member.summary: Represents a global search operation that can be performed across multiple data sources.
member.remarks: This class provides functionality to search for data across various sources, aggregating results into a unified format. It is designed to handle large datasets efficiently and can be customized to include or exclude specific data sources.

member.name: F:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchType.Column
member.summary: Represents a column in a data table or database schema.
member.remarks: This class is typically used to define the structure of a table by specifying the properties of each column, such as its name, data type, and constraints. It can be used in conjunction with other classes to build and manipulate database schemas programmatically.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandler`1
member.summary: Defines methods for applying search filters and sorting operations on a collection of entities.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity on which the search and sort operations are performed.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandler`1.PropertyName
member.summary: Gets the name of the property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandler`1.ApplySearchFilterAsync(Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchType,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously constructs a search filter expression based on the specified search type and search term.
member.remarks: The returned expression can be used in LINQ queries to filter entities according to the specified search type and term. Ensure that the is valid and appropriate for the chosen .
member.param: The type of search to perform, which determines the filtering logic applied.
The term to search for within the entity data. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an expression that can be used to filter entities of type based on the specified search criteria.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandler`1.AddOrderBySort(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending or descending order based on a specified column name.
member.param: The sequence of elements to sort.
The name of the column to sort by. This must be a valid property name of the elements in the sequence.
The direction of the sort. Use "asc" for ascending order or "desc" for descending order.
member.returns: An whose elements are sorted according to the specified column and direction.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandler`1.AddThenBySort(System.Linq.IOrderedQueryable{`0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an additional sorting criterion to the existing ordered query based on the specified column name and direction.
member.param: The existing ordered query to which the new sorting criterion will be added.
The name of the column by which to sort the query. This must be a valid column name in the query's entity type.
The direction of the sort, either "asc" for ascending or "desc" for descending. The value is case-insensitive.
member.returns: An that represents the query with the additional sorting applied.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandlerFactory`1
member.summary: Defines a factory for creating search handlers for a specified entity type.
member.typeparam: The type of entity for which the search handler is created.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.ISearchHandlerFactory`1.GetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a search handler for the specified property of the entity.
member.param: The name of the property for which to retrieve the search handler. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an for the specified property.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column
member.summary: Represents a column in a data table, including properties for title, data source, searchability, orderability, and more.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title associated with the object.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the data source for the column, which can be a property name or a field name.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the column, which is used for identification purposes.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Searchable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the column is searchable.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Orderable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the column is orderable.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Search
member.summary: Gets or sets the search criteria for the column, which includes the search value and whether to use regular expressions.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of data in the column, which can be used for formatting or validation purposes.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Column.Filterable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the column is filterable.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest
member.summary: Represents a request for data in a DataTable format, including pagination, sorting, and search criteria.
member.remarks: This class is used to encapsulate the parameters sent from a client-side DataTable to a server-side processing endpoint. It includes properties for pagination (such as and ), sorting (via ), and search criteria (via and ).

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.Draw
member.summary: Gets or sets the draw count for the current operation.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting index for the operation.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the item.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.Search
member.summary: Gets or sets the search configuration for the current context.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.Order
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of orders associated with the current context.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.Columns
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of columns associated with the entity.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableRequest.SearchBuilder
member.summary: Gets or sets the search builder configuration for the form.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult`1
member.summary: Represents the result of a data table operation, including the data items and metadata about the operation.
member.remarks: This class is typically used to encapsulate the results of a server-side data table query, including the data items and additional information such as the draw count and record totals. It is designed to be serialized to JSON for communication with client-side data table components.
member.typeparam: The type of the data items contained in the result.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult`1.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the array of data items returned by the data table operation.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult`1.Draw
member.summary: Gets or sets the draw count, which is used to ensure that the response corresponds to the request made by the client.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult`1.RecordsFiltered
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of records after filtering has been applied.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult`1.RecordsTotal
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of records available in the data source, regardless of filtering.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTableResult`1.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets an error message, if any occurred during the data table operation.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTablesObject
member.summary: Represents an abstract base class for objects that can hold additional data fields not explicitly defined in the class structure.
member.remarks: This class uses JSON extension data to store extra data fields in a dictionary. The property allows for dynamic storage of additional key-value pairs, where the key is a string and the value is a .

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.DataTablesObject.ExtraData
member.summary: Gets or sets a dictionary that holds additional data fields not explicitly defined in the class structure.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Order
member.summary: Represents sorting information for a column in a data table.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Order.Column
member.summary: Gets or sets the index of the column to which the sorting should be applied.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Order.Dir
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction of the sort ("asc" or "desc").

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.OrderedColumn
member.summary: Represents a column with an associated sort direction for ordering operations.
member.remarks: The class is used to specify the order in which data should be sorted. The property indicates the name of the column to sort by, and the property specifies the sort direction, typically "ASC" for ascending or "DESC" for descending.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.OrderedColumn.ColumnName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the column to be ordered.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.OrderedColumn.Direction
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction of the sort operation.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Search
member.summary: Represents search criteria for a data table, including the search value and whether to use regular expressions.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Search.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the search value to apply to the data table.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.Search.RegEx
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the search value should be treated as a regular expression.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1
member.summary: Provides a base implementation for handling search and sorting operations on entities of type .
member.remarks: This abstract class serves as a template for implementing search and sorting functionality. It provides default behavior for applying search filters, ordering queryable sources, and logging operations. Derived classes can override the provided virtual methods to customize the behavior for specific use cases.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity that the search handler operates on.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate{`0}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: The logger is used to capture diagnostic and operational information during the execution of the search handler. Ensure that a valid implementation is provided to avoid runtime issues.
member.param: The logger instance used to log messages for the .

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger used for logging operations within the search handler.
member.remarks: Override this property to provide a custom logger implementation if logging is required.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.PropertyName
member.summary: Gets the name of the property.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.ApplySearchFilterAsync(Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchType,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously applies a search or filter operation based on the specified search type and search term.
member.remarks: This method determines the appropriate search or filter logic based on the and delegates the operation to either the OnSearch or OnFilter method. If an exception occurs during the operation, it is logged, and a default expression is returned.
member.param: The type of search to perform. Use for a global search or other values for specific filtering.
The term to search or filter by. This value is used to generate the search or filter expression.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an expression that evaluates to a boolean value, representing the search or filter criteria to be applied to the entity.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.AddOrderBySort(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Applies an ordering to the specified queryable source based on the given column name and sort direction.
member.remarks: This method delegates the ordering logic to the method, which can be overridden to customize behavior.
member.param: The queryable source to which the ordering will be applied. Cannot be null.
The name of the column to sort by. Must correspond to a valid property of .
The direction of the sort. Use for ascending order or for descending order.
member.returns: An representing the source with the specified ordering applied.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.AddThenBySort(System.Linq.IOrderedQueryable{`0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an additional sorting condition to an already ordered queryable source.
member.param: The ordered queryable source to which the additional sorting condition will be applied.
The name of the column to sort by. Must match a valid property of the entity type.
The direction of the sort. Use for ascending or for descending.
member.returns: An representing the source with the additional sorting condition applied.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.OnAddOrderBySort(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Applies an ordering to the specified queryable source based on the given column name and sort direction.
member.remarks: This method is virtual and can be overridden to customize the ordering behavior. Ensure that the corresponds to a valid property of .
member.param: The queryable source to which the ordering will be applied.
The name of the column to sort by. This parameter is case-insensitive.
The sort direction, specified as "asc" for ascending or "desc" for descending. If the value is not "asc", descending order is applied by default.
member.returns: An representing the source with the specified ordering applied.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.OnAddThenBySort(System.Linq.IOrderedQueryable{`0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an additional sorting condition to an already ordered queryable source.
member.remarks: This method is intended to be overridden in derived classes to customize the behavior of adding additional sorting conditions. The default implementation applies the sorting based on the specified column name and direction.
member.param: The to which the additional sorting condition will be applied.
The name of the column to sort by. This parameter is case-insensitive.
The direction of the sort. Use for ascending order or for descending order.
member.returns: An with the additional sorting condition applied.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.OnSearch(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a search expression based on the provided search term.
member.remarks: This method is intended to be overridden in derived classes to provide custom search logic. The default implementation returns , indicating no filtering.
member.param: The term to be used for filtering entities. Can be null or empty, in which case no filtering is applied.
member.returns: An expression that represents the search filter to be applied to entities of type . Returns if no filtering is required.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.DataTables.SearchHandlerTemplate`1.OnFilter(System.String)
member.summary: Provides a filter expression to be applied to a query based on the specified search term.
member.param: The search term used to generate the filter expression. Can be null or empty.
member.returns: An expression that represents the filter to apply to the query. Returns if no filter is applied.
